# ForgeFrame Media

> A San Antonio short-form video studio that produces scroll-stopping reels engineered to book customers — not just chase views. Fully done-for-you, with no camera required and no long-term contract.

## What we do
- **AI talking-head video:** We build a digital twin of the business owner from a few photos and a 30-second voice clip, then produce daily talking-head videos in their likeness and voice. The owner never films anything — they just approve the script.
- **Content engineered to convert:** Hook-first product, ASMR, and story edits built on what actually makes a stranger stop, save, and call — not trend-chasing.
- **Done-for-you, everywhere:** We script, generate, edit, caption, and post to TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.

## Who it's for
Local service businesses and owners who want consistent, high-quality short-form presence without having to film, edit, or post themselves — roofers, HVAC, electricians, plumbers, med spas, restaurants, auto shops, contractors, and personal brands.

## Why we're different
- We optimize for booked customers and inbound, not vanity views or likes.
- Elite production quality — we don't ship low-effort AI slop.
- The owner never has to be on camera.
- Month-to-month, cancel anytime. No long-term contract.

## Plans
- Stay Seen — 12 reels/month, $1,500/mo
- Get Booked — 20 reels/month, $2,900/mo (includes digital-twin talking-head)
- Own the Market — 30 reels/month, $3,900/mo (highest-volume tier; daily posting, priority production, lead-funnel landing page; lower cost per reel than Get Booked)
- Every plan begins with a one-time setup (from $500) to build the client's digital twin and content strategy.
- If paid ads are included, ad spend is billed separately at cost (never marked up); the plan price covers content only.

## Location & contact
- Based in San Antonio, TX. Serves clients nationwide.
- Phone/text: 210-920-4223
- Website: https://www.forgeframe.media
- New clients can request a free sample reel of their own business before paying anything.
